mapper.select: select cm.id, cm.role, cm.content, cm.created_at as createTime from chatbot_message cm left join chatbot_conversation cc on cm.conversation_id = cc.id where cm.conversation_id = #{id} and cc.user_id = #{userId}

select cc.id, cc.name, count(cm.id) as messageCount, cc.created_at, cc.updated_at from chatbot_conversation cc left join chatbot_message cm on cm.conversation_id = cc.id where cc.user_id = #{userId} and cc.status = 1 group by cc.id, cc.name, cc.created_at, cc.updated_at order by cc.updated_at desc

select cm.id, cm.role, cm.content, cm.created_at from chatbot_message cm left join chatbot_conversation cc on cc.id = cm.conversation_id where cm.conversation_id = #{id} and cc.user_id = #{userId} and cc.status = 1
select name from chatbot_conversation where id = #{id} and status = 1
select cm.id, cm.role, cm.content, cm.created_at from chatbot_message cm where cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by cm.created_at asc
